diversification.construction_note: Use DIV = 1 - HHI when HHI is concentration. Alternatively, use entropy if segment sales are available. If segment sales are absent, the reproducibility code creates a transparent count-based proxy using Number of branches and Number of production lines: DIV = 1 - 1/(branches + lines). Replace with segment-sales HHI for publication.

information_asymmetry.construction_note: Amihud = mean(abs(return) / value_traded) by firm-year; AMIHUD is scaled by 1e9 for readable regression coefficients.

earnings_quality.construction_note: If using absolute discretionary accruals, EQ = -abs(DA); higher EQ means better quality. If EAR already means earnings management, EQ = -abs(EAR).

corporate_governance.construction_note: Standardize each component; reverse CEO duality so larger score means stronger governance; average available standardized components.
